tasks.label: Build and Run (Debug)
tasks.detail: Dispatch to platform-specific debug run script

tasks.label: Build and Run (Debug, macOS)
tasks.detail: Build and run the application in debug mode on macOS

tasks.label: Build and Run (Debug, Windows)
args: cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug && cmake --build build --config Debug && build\sfml3-app.exe
tasks.detail: Build and run the application in debug mode on Windows

tasks.label: Build and Run (Release, macOS)
tasks.detail: Build and run the application in release mode on macOS

tasks.label: Build and Run (Release, Windows)
args: cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build build --config Release && build\sfml3-app.exe
tasks.detail: Build and run the application in release mode on Windows
